title: Sangam Basnet
text: I am currently a public health expert at Rural Reconstruction Nepal where I have been worked on some stuff, which has resulted in… I also have had worked on some monitoring and evaluation stuff… I have a strong background in qualitative methods… I have an interest in understanding how we can improve mental health through implementation science… yeah I’m pretty awesome.
